name: theHarvester
description: Imports OSINT recon results from theHarvester (https://github.com/laramies/theHarvester). Discovered hosts and IP addresses become ASSETs (hostname + IP). Offline mode: parse a theHarvester JSON output file (`theHarvester -f <name>` → <name>.json). Live mode: if `domain` is set and the `theHarvester` binary is on the worker PATH, runs `theHarvester -d <domain> -b <sources> -f`. Read-only OSINT (non-intrusive). No DB access in run.py (worker-safe).

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Path on the worker to a theHarvester JSON output file to import.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.help: Live mode: domain to harvest with the local `theHarvester` binary.

parameters.name: sources
parameters.help: Live mode: theHarvester sources passed to -b (default: all).
